MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Warren Williams, Esq., of Mendes & Mount LLP, (213) 955-7748, appeared telephonically through Court Call for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. ATTORNEY WILLIAMS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS DEFENDANT AND, THEREFORE, REQUESTED THAT DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT VOUGHT AIRCRAFT INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. (301/HEK/) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR #7077

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Eaton Corporation's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)

Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558(301/JLW)
